$comment: Maps publisher slugs (must match sources.kind='email_bridge' rows) to the sender-header values we expect to see when their emails arrive. Used by scripts/auto-register-bridges.ts (run on cron via .github/workflows/auto-register-bridges.yml). New publisher? Add a block here; the next auto-register tick promotes its unmatched rows into sender_map. Wrong values cause no harm — unmatched rows stay in unmatched until corrected.
